Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class ExF.Input

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerInputs.ForwardInfReasoner.Input
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.ExF.Input
All Implemented Interfaces:
IReasonerInput, ITranslatableReasonerInput
Enclosing class:
ExF
public static class ExF.Input extends ForwardInfReasoner.Input
An input adding an optional list of names to the super-class input.

  • Field Details

    • names

      private String[] names

    • error

      private String error

  • Constructor Details

    • Input

      public Input(Predicate pred)
      Constructs an input with no user-provided names.
      Parameters:
      pred - hypothesis to use for the inference

    • Input

      public Input(Predicate pred, String input, FormulaFactory ff)
      Constructs an input with user-provided names. The input should be a comma-separated list of names. It may be empty. The names will be checked to be valid identifiers in the provided formula factory.
      Parameters:
      pred - hypothesis to use for the inference
      input - comma-separated list of names
      ff - formula factory to use to check names validity

    • Input

      private Input(Predicate pred, String[] names)

      public String[] getNames()

    • hasError

      public boolean hasError()
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerInput
      Returns true iff there was an error while constructing the reasoner input.

      Returns:
      true iff there was an error while constructing the reasoner input.

    • getError

      public String getError()
      Description copied from interface: IReasonerInput
      Returns the cause of the error in constructing the reasoner input.
      Specified by:
      getError in interface IReasonerInput
      Overrides:
      getError in class ForwardInfReasoner.Input
      Returns:
      the cause of the error, or null in case there was no error in constructing the reasoner input.

    • translate

      public ExF.Input translate(FormulaFactory factory)
      Description copied from interface: ITranslatableReasonerInput
      Translates the formulas inside this reasoner input using the given formula factory.
      Specified by:

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Returns:
